frontMatter.title: FizzBuzz with Pattern Matching in Kotlin
frontMatter.summary: Seeing FizzBuzz implementation in Clojure with clojure.core.match makes me wondering if Kotlin has the same pattern matching capabilities or at least some resemblance in the way of doing matching.
